Intraday post (12/Feb)

Weekly post:

Python course is launched | Weekly post (09-13/Feb)

I’m happy to announce that the Python course is now available on my website for all paid subscribers. See details by clicking on the link.

Initial Jobless Claimsis down by 5,000 from the previous week's revised level of 232,000. Labor market is stable, and it’s potentially re-accelerating. Fed cut will likely get delayed. Market and me expect bigger flush into late spring as said. Until, uncertain ranging remains just as I keep calling this since last year November.

I will write a FREE report soon covering cryptomarket and AI bubble, and explain why the bubble-burst is near.

Let’s look at the daily positioning…

INTRADAY POST Coding today’s positioning:

It is not visible on the charts, but the net speed profile is negative, customers are about to defend the 6955 - 6890 range, but it is not really confident. Upside vvol is heavily sold, downside too but in a lower rate.

The centroid of the profile is at 6927.10 - 6941.19 range. This is a low probabiliy reversion potential back upwards, with a local pin at 45/50

Upside pivot is at 6980.28with target of 7009.02This target is pretty much looks like a reversion line, with local pin at the pivot. Until PM session (1PM approximately), it can be broken, and pin to 7015/20, but this is a low probability scenario.

Downside pivot is at 6916.37with target of 6892.15If the pivot would be broken during the first 2 hours, the target is most likely a reversion line back up to the pivot. However, there is a chance that at the target market vol gets supplied and spot gets magnetized be 6870/80 zone.Low probability.

Positioning is very uncertain. Keep your eyes on ES 6965/70 zone, with upside confirmation at 7000/10, and downside confirmation at 6950/55Market doesn’t price in bearish pivot, but CPI is very uncertain. All what market is betting on is volatility not direction. So, kep your eyes on these lines.
